creator: jinlong.hao@gausscode.com
text:
I install gnome and use fcitx as my default input methods, and fcitx works all right within both gtk/gtk3 and qt programs.

but it does not work for java program such as jedit, intellij, etc. 
also doesn't work for the linux binary program, such as linux-firefox, etc.


The same as scim and ibus.
